3286470.name: Project Campfire
3286470.description:
Project Campfire is an online VR adventure set on a living island full of cultures, secrets, and possibilities. You’re not just stranded, you arrive in a world that reacts to you, remembers your actions, and grows alongside you. Your path. Your skills. Your story. Become a woodworker, a cook, a builder, a farmer, a beast trainer, an alchemist… or something entirely your own. Campfire gives you tools, but true mastery comes from your real-world skill, not menus.

  • Crafting & Professions

Forge weapons, cook meals, cultivate fields, tame creatures, study alchemy or develop your magic. Timing, precision and knowledge shape your success.

  • Adventure & Exploration

Wander bright beaches, enchanted forests, ancient ruins or dangerous dungeons. Nothing is mandatory. Everything is possible. And if you don’t want to go alone? Create a quest and let others take the job.

  • A living world

The island’s people – Orelia, Naila and Sontras – have their own cultures, festivals, and ways of life. You may arrive as a stranger, but you can become part of their story.

  • Community & Impact

Your actions matter. Major accomplishments appear in the weekly in-game newspaper, shared by players within and beyond the world.

  • A growing experience

Project Campfire is built together with its community, step by step, island by island with heart, passion, and no big studio behind it. Welcome to the campfire. Every great adventure begins with a spark.
